description: DB-backed integration: MSP-side board loading returns active tenant boards for a contact's client context without querying `boards.client_id`.
DB-backed integration: client portal admin board loading returns active tenant boards for the acting admin's client scope without querying `boards.client_id`.
DB-backed integration: group create/update accepts active tenant board IDs and rejects invalid or inactive board IDs.
Guard: assigning a group from another client to a contact still fails based on `group.client_id` and `contact.client_id`.

DB-backed integration: the shared visibility resolver returns unrestricted access for unassigned contacts and the stored allowed board IDs for restricted contacts without requiring `boards.client_id`.
Integration: client portal ticket list still scopes to the contact's client and applies allowed-board filtering for a restricted contact.
Integration: client portal ticket detail and ticket documents/comments fail closed for a hidden-board ticket while still allowing a visible-board ticket for the same client.
Integration: client portal ticket creation only offers allowed active boards to a restricted contact and rejects manual submission to a disallowed board.
Integration: ticket-backed dashboard counts and summaries continue to reflect only the visible boards for a restricted contact.
Regression: unassigned contacts still retain full ticket visibility and full ticket creation behavior within their own client.
Regression: empty-group and pre-invite assignment behavior still work after the model correction.

Smoke readiness: Emerald City seeded scenario can create groups, assign restricted/full-access/pre-invite contacts, and exercise restricted vs unrestricted visibility without false empty board states.
